creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to Don Lewis from comment #9)

This totally reminds me of https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/eae03f41a03799a8ed859f8e861f1603cc2728ce#diff-85aafeaf48f7a3b68fdf1d4fc362eca97beada29ac94d60835b915a5394de786R90-R92

ghostscript does not need libcurl at all, but libtesseract config file says you need to link against it, then you have the error report by poudriere.
